REASONING: Power Word Stun on Aven — Bardic Musician (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!

REASONING: Finger of Death on Aven — Bardic Musician. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Aven — Bardic Musician.
→ Aven — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 20] FAIL! 36 necrotic damage. HP: 31/67
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.

→ Aven — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
